reference: IT WOULDN'T DO YOU KNOW AFTER THAT STORY CAME OUT FOR ME AND THE VICE CHANCELLOR WHO SAT IN THE CASE AS WELL AS OTHER JUDGES AND MEMBERS OF THE BAR TO BE SEEN THERE KENNETH EXPLAINED TO THE COLONEL
text: It wouldn't do, you know. After that story came out, for me and the Vice Chancellor who sat in the case, as well as other judges and members of the bar to be seen there, Kenneth explained to the Colonel.
